user.title: Dynamic Home
user.description: Which module do you want to add?

vmc.title: Dynamic Ventilation (VMC)
vmc.description: Select your VMC entities. Optional fields enable free-cooling (temperatures) and the outdoor-AQI cap.

shutter.title: Dynamic Shutter
shutter.description: Select the shutter and its orientation. Climate and sensors are optional (enable solar shield, free-cooling and weather protection).

data.name: Name
data.facade_span_deg: Facade acceptance angle (° span, e.g. 90 = narrow, 180 = wide)

climate.title: Dynamic Climate (Zone)
climate.description: Climate zone. Publishes solar-gain (heat) / solar-shield (cool) intents to the configured shutters.

data.name: Name
data.dc_climate: Thermostat to drive (optional; advisory if empty)
data.ds_target: Shutter target on the bus (e.g. ds)

data_description.co2_v2: CO₂ level (ppm) that raises the VMC to V2. Thresholds decide when to step up.
data_description.co2_v3: CO₂ level (ppm) that raises the VMC to V3.
data_description.pm_v2: PM2.5 level (µg/m³) that raises the VMC to V2.
data_description.pm_v3: PM2.5 level (µg/m³) that raises the VMC to V3.
data_description.co2_hys: CO₂ drop margin before stepping down. Prevents sawtooth; if it oscillates, raise it a bit.
data_description.pm_hys: PM2.5 drop margin before stepping down (anti sawtooth).

data_description.co2_ema_enabled: Smooth CO₂ with an EMA before deciding (less jitter).
data_description.pm_ema_enabled: Smooth PM2.5 with an EMA before deciding.
data_description.co2_ema_alpha: CO₂ EMA factor (higher = more reactive, less smoothing).

data_description.freecool_t_ext_min: Do not free-cool below this outdoor temp (too cold).

data_description.hostile_t1: Outdoor AQI that caps the VMC at V2 (outside starting to be bad).
data_description.hostile_t2: Outdoor AQI that caps the VMC at V1.
data_description.hostile_t3: Outdoor AQI that turns the VMC off (don't pull very bad air).

data_description.dry_v2_delta: Dew-point advantage (dp_indoor − dp_outdoor, °C) to dry at V2.
data_description.dry_v3_delta: Dew-point advantage to dry at V3.
data_description.dew_spread_min: Indoor temp within this of the dew point flags condensation risk.
data_description.dry_margin: Minimum dew-point advantage (dp_indoor − dp_outdoor, °C) before drying ventilation engages.
data_description.dry_hys: Hysteresis band: drying disengages once the advantage falls below margin − hysteresis.

data_description.co2_sanity_floor: CO₂ readings below this (ppm) are treated as a sensor fault and routed to the failsafe, since an occupied room can't be below the ~410 ppm atmospheric baseline. PM2.5 is not floored.
data_description.stale_threshold_s: A vital sensor older than this (s) counts as failed.
data_description.startup_grace_s: Grace period after start before the failsafe can trip (s).
data_description.trip_window_s: Window (s) over which repeated trips are counted.
data_description.trip_limit: Trips within the window that arm a lockout.
data_description.lockout_s: How long the failsafe lockout lasts (s).

data_description.shower_rh_delta_on: Bathroom RH rise (Δ%) that triggers a shower boost. If it detects false showers, raise this.
data_description.shower_rh_delta_off: RH delta below which the shower boost ends. If it cuts too soon, lower this.
data_description.shower_hold_s: Minimum hold time for the shower boost (seconds). If it cuts too soon, raise it.
data_description.shower_level: Target speed while a shower is detected (V2/V3).

data_description.adaptive_min_samples: Readings needed before adaptive IAQ thresholds are used.

data_description.winter_night_pct: Position on winter nights (close to insulate).
data_description.weather_max_open_pct: Max opening under a weather alert.
data_description.sdhb_solar_shield_max_open_pct: Max opening when DC asks for solar shielding (cooling).

data_description.freecool_delta: Indoor−outdoor ΔT that justifies opening for free-cooling.
data_description.hot_delta: ΔT above which the room counts as hot (shading logic).

data_description.wind_limit_kmh: Wind speed that forces protective closing.
data_description.wind_cap_span_kmh: Range above the limit over which opening is progressively capped.
data_description.wind_cap_hyst_kmh: Hysteresis to release the wind cap.

data_description.slew_enabled: Move the shutter in steps instead of jumping (smoother, fewer motor starts).
data_description.slew_step_pct: Max % the position changes per step.

data_description.window_height_cm: Window height for the solar-penetration geometry.

data_description.base_heat_day: Daytime starting point when heating. Feeds the Active Base and, in cascade, the target. Set it to your real comfort (e.g. 22.0–22.8 °C) and let the biases do the rest.
data_description.base_cool_day: Daytime starting point when cooling. Start conservative (26–27 °C) to avoid aggressive cooling and oscillation.
data_description.delta_night: How much the base eases at night (sun below −3°): lowers the setpoint when heating, raises it when cooling. If you get too warm at night, raise it gradually (0.1 steps).
data_description.vac_base_heat_day: Heating base while Vacation mode is on (energy-saving reduced setpoint).
data_description.vac_base_cool_day: Cooling base while Vacation mode is on (energy-saving raised setpoint).

data_description.target_min_heat: Lowest allowed setpoint when heating (normal mode). The final target is never clamped below this.
data_description.target_max_heat: Highest allowed setpoint when heating (normal mode). The final target is never clamped above this.
data_description.target_min_cool: Lowest allowed setpoint when cooling (normal mode).
data_description.target_max_cool: Highest allowed setpoint when cooling (normal mode).
data_description.step: Quantization step for the final target (rounding), e.g. 0.1 °C.
data_description.max_mods_heat: Hard cap on the combined push of all biases/brakes in heat, before the limited target. If it falls short, raise it in small steps; if it gets aggressive, lower it or review the biases first.
data_description.max_mods_cool: Hard cap on the combined push of all biases/brakes in cool (same idea as the heat cap).
data_description.apply_min_delta: Minimum change vs the last setpoint before pushing a new one to the thermostat (anti-jitter). 0 applies always; with a small step (0.1) try 0.2.
data_description.vac_target_min_heat: Lowest heating setpoint while on vacation.
data_description.vac_target_max_heat: Highest heating setpoint while on vacation.
data_description.vac_target_min_cool: Lowest cooling setpoint while on vacation.
data_description.vac_target_max_cool: Highest cooling setpoint while on vacation.

data_description.ext_cold_threshold: Outdoor temp at/below which a heating bias kicks in (cold compensation).
data_description.ext_hot_threshold: Outdoor temp at/above which a cooling bias kicks in (hot compensation).
data_description.bias_ext_heat_strong: Heating bias when it is clearly cold (below the threshold).
data_description.bias_ext_heat_mild: Heating bias in the mild band just above the cold threshold.
data_description.bias_ext_cool_strong: Cooling bias when it is clearly hot.
data_description.bias_ext_cool_mild: Cooling bias in the mild band near the hot threshold.
data_description.insulation_factor: 0–1 multiplier on the outdoor bias: lower it for a well-insulated home.

data_description.sdhb_bias_solar_gain_heat: Setpoint relief when DC receives a solar-gain intent while heating (free sun warms the room).
data_description.sdhb_bias_solar_shield_cool: Setpoint raise when DC receives a solar-shield intent while cooling.

data_description.vmc_bias_heat_1: Heating compensation when the VMC runs at V1 (ventilation loads the room).
data_description.vmc_bias_heat_2: Heating compensation when the VMC runs at V2.
data_description.vmc_bias_heat_3: Heating compensation when the VMC runs at V3.
data_description.vmc_bias_cool_1: Cooling compensation when the VMC runs at V1.
data_description.vmc_bias_cool_2: Cooling compensation when the VMC runs at V2.
data_description.vmc_bias_cool_3: Cooling compensation when the VMC runs at V3.

data_description.trend_lead_h: Fallback anticipation (hours) when temperatures are unavailable.
data_description.trend_max_shift: Max °C the trend can shift the target per cycle (anti-spike).
data_description.lead_per_degree_h: Extra anticipation per °C of indoor/outdoor gap (inertia).
data_description.lead_wind_h_per_kmh: Extra anticipation per km/h of wind (higher losses).
data_description.lead_min_h: Lower clamp on the computed lead (hours).
data_description.lead_max_h: Upper clamp on the computed lead (hours).
data_description.trend_deadband_cph: Trend below this (°C/h) is treated as zero (noise).

data_description.brake_thresholds_1: Trend speed (°C/h) for brake step 1 (only when the trend already helps the mode).
data_description.brake_biases_1: °C the brake subtracts at step 1 to avoid overshoot.

data_description.forecast_gain: How strongly the forecast eases the setpoint (°C per °C of expected help). Brake-only.
data_description.forecast_cap: Max °C the forecast bias can apply.
data_description.forecast_window_h: Look-ahead window (hours) scanned for the helping extreme.

data_description.adapt_alpha: EMA smoothing of the learned rate/overshoot/lag.
data_description.adapt_gain_lr: Learning step toward the lead target each cycle.
data_description.adapt_overshoot_target: Tolerated overshoot (°C) before the lead is corrected.
data_description.adapt_rate_floor_cph: Floor on the learned heating/cooling rate (avoids divide-by-zero).
data_description.adapt_lag_k: Weight of the learned thermal lag in the lead.
data_description.adapt_on_rate_min_dt_h: Min ON duration (h) to trust a rate sample.
data_description.adapt_on_rate_min_dt: Min temperature change (°C) to trust a rate sample.
data_description.adapt_off_window_h: Window (h) watched after OFF to learn overshoot and lag.
data_description.lead_adaptive_min_h: Lower clamp on the learned lead (hours).
data_description.lead_adaptive_max_h: Upper clamp on the learned lead (hours).

data_description.dew_spread_min: Condensation risk when indoor temp is within this margin of the dew point (radiant-cooling safety).

data_description.facade_gain_heat: Max setpoint relief from sunlit open facades while heating (free solar gain).
data_description.facade_gain_cool: Max setpoint relief from sunlit facades while cooling.

data_description.preset: Loads a ready-made set of values for a typical installation. You can fine-tune any field afterwards.

data_description.filter_life_hours: Total hours a filter lasts before replacement; the filter-life % sensor counts down from this value.

data_description.anticip_co2_rate_on: CO₂ rise rate (ppm/h) that pre-boosts ventilation before the absolute level is reached.
data_description.anticip_co2_rate_off: Rate below which the anticipatory boost releases (hysteresis).
data_description.anticip_pm_rate_on: PM2.5 rise rate (µg/m³/h) that pre-boosts ventilation.
data_description.anticip_pm_rate_off: PM2.5 rate below which the anticipatory boost releases.
data_description.anticip_hold_s: Minimum hold so a brief spike doesn't cause oscillation (seconds).
data_description.anticip_level: Target speed while a steep rise is detected (V1/V2/V3).
data_description.anticip_ema_alpha: Smoothing of the slope itself (higher = more reactive).

data_description.quiet_critical_co2: During quiet hours the speed is capped, but a CO₂ at or above this lifts the cap (health > silence).
data_description.quiet_critical_pm: PM2.5 at or above this lifts the quiet-hours cap.

data_description.hrv_bypass_eff_max: Efficiency (0..1) at or below which, with a real ΔT, the exchanger is considered in bypass / not recovering.
data_description.hrv_bypass_dt_min: Minimum extract−intake ΔT (°C) needed before judging recovery vs bypass.

data_description.valve_power_min: When the valve source is numeric (power, W), a reading above this counts the valve/relay as active.

data_description.mold_rh_threshold: Relative humidity at/above which mold-risk hours accrue.
data_description.mold_on_h: Accumulated hours that arm the alert and drying.
data_description.mold_off_h: Accumulated hours below which it disarms (hysteresis).
data_description.mold_decay_h: Exponential decay time constant while RH is below the threshold.
data_description.mold_cap_h: Maximum value the index can reach.

data_description.window_drop_cph: Indoor-temperature change against the demand (°C/h) that flags a likely open window (only when no window sensor is configured).
data_description.window_confirm_min: Minutes the anomaly must persist before the zone is switched off.
data_description.window_release_min: Minutes of stable temperature before normal control resumes.
data_description.window_max_lockout_min: Safety timeout that resumes control even if the temperature has not stabilised.

abort.no_options: No tunable options for this module.

reset_learning.name: Reset adaptive learning
reset_learning.description: Wipes the learned adaptive-lead model of a climate (DC) zone so it relearns from scratch.

set_observe.name: Set observe (dry-run)
set_observe.description: Enables or disables observe mode: the pipeline is still evaluated but no hardware is driven.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True to enter observe (dry-run), False to resume acting on hardware.

reset_filter.name: Reset filter hours
reset_filter.description: Zeroes the filter-hours counter of a VMC (DV) module.

recalibrate.name: Recalibrate now
recalibrate.description: Forces an immediate re-evaluation of the targeted modules' pipeline.

boost.name: Boost (timed V3)
boost.description: Forces a VMC to V3 for a number of minutes, then auto-reverts. Bypasses the quiet-hours cap.

minutes.name: Minutes
minutes.description: How long to hold V3 before reverting (default 15).

required_source_missing.title: {name}: required sensor unavailable
required_source_missing.description: The climate zone "{name}" is calling for heating or cooling but its {missing} source is unavailable. Adaptive learning is paused and the zone falls back to its base setpoint until the sensor recovers. Check the sensor wiring or its entity in Home Assistant.

mold_risk.title: {name}: sustained mold risk
mold_risk.description: The zone "{name}" has had a high relative humidity for a sustained period (mold-risk index {index} h). Ventilation drying is requested when the outdoor air is drier, and a dehumidifier (if configured) is switched on. Consider airing the room or checking for moisture sources.
